Backtest Report: UT Bot + HMA / EMA Strategy

Generated 2026-05-13 16:53 — vectorbt 0.28.2

Strategy Rules

  • Indicators: UT Bot (ATR 10, K=2.5), HMA(100), EMA(200)
  • Entry: UT Bot Buy environment (≥2 days) AND Close > HMA(100) AND Close > EMA(200) AND ADX(14) > 20 AND Volume > 20d SMA → buy at next day's open — allocate 5% of current equity per position (compounding, max 20 concurrent). Cooldown: 3 days after stop-out before re-entering same symbol.
  • Take profit: +20% → sell all. Breakeven stop: once profit ≥ +10%, stop-loss moves to entry price (保本止损).
  • Stop-loss: Close < HMA(100) OR Close < EMA(200) OR UT Bot enters Sell environment

Data: 47 symbols, 2002-03-11 → 2026-05-12 (24.2 years). Initial capital $1,000,000.
